item.title: “AI: it feels most impressive when you don’t know much about the subject, don’t care or don’t have a...
item.description:
“AI: it feels most impressive when you don’t know much about the subject, don’t care or don’t have a clear idea of what the you want…
Once you know what something should feel or look like, it becomes almost impossible to guide AI there.”
--- @GaryMarcus | ❤️ 17 | 🔁 1 | 💬 5 | 👁 1055
item.author: @GaryMarcus
